title: Scientists discover new planet
body: Astronomers have discovered a new Earth-like planet in a nearby solar system.
label: Real

title: Time travel machine invented
body: A blog post claims a scientist has built a working time travel device.
label: Fake

title: Satire: Dogs run for mayor
body: A satirical article imagines dogs campaigning for mayor in a small town.
label: Satire

title: Fake news about celebrity death
body: A false rumor spread online about a famous actor's death, later debunked.
label: Fake

title: UN announces climate initiative
body: The United Nations has launched a new global initiative to combat climate change.
label: Real
